title: ImVos Pack
description: A Minecraft 1.8.9 Texture Pack With Mixed Resolutions, Used By The Streamer ImVos
body:
# ImVos Pack
- Changes the way **1.8.9** looks.
- Includes most Hypixel Bedwars items
## Pictures
![Swords](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/flWQcPWp/images/833c3b1e2fc67d0c9760ae6581404b8915d6ad9a.png)
![Chests & Resources](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d91fc8d3159b7c65e8fe1421d91119b67cbe3e1c.png)
##   Credits
- **Zyph Default Pack** (Used as base, but changed almost every texture)
- **Liquify** (Connected clay textures)
